*p76188a01032* do not write in this area    do not write in this area          do not write in this area 10          4.  the number of bacteria on a surface is being monitored.   the number of bacteria, n, on the surface, t hours after monitoring began is modelled  by the equation log10 n = 0.35t + 2 use the equation of the model to answer parts (a) to (c).   (a)  find the initial number of bacteria on the surface. (1)   (b)  show that the equation of the model can be written in the form  n = ab t     where a and b are constants to be found. give the value of b to 2 decimal places. (3)   (c)  hence find the rate of growth of bacteria on the surface exactly 5 hours after  monitoring began. (2)
